extraction.one_line_summary: KELDERMAN Saurin Craig Anderson attacked late on Curyat climb finish to take his first pro win after DLOOSE's earlier move was caught
tactical_patterns: Sunweb held back Anderson while DLOOSE bridged, timing final acceleration only after early move was neutralized
Peloton fragmented on Curyat approach before summit, suggesting gradient ramped unexpectedly hard in final kilometers

rider_signals.DLOOSE Lawrence: negative: burned matches with premature solo effort on Curyat, got caught before summit
rider_signals.ANDERSON Saurin Craig: positive: Sunweb neo-pro shows Curyat summit finish suits him better than established climbers expected
